title: Lineup
description: Validates a lineup artifact — the issue plan: which candidates run, which are omitted, and the editorial rationale. Produced by edit; consumed by write and publish.

selected.description: The candidates that will run as stories in this issue.

omitted.description: Candidates explicitly not run, each with a reason. Every dispatch candidate not selected must appear here — no candidate is silently dropped.

coverage_rationale.description: The editorial judgment behind this selection and its balance across the corpus.

candidate_id.description: The dispatch candidate selected to run.

angle.description: The editorial framing the story should take.

prominence.description: Optional placement — e.g. lead, feature, brief.

reason.description: Why this candidate is not running.

disposition.description: deferred = a live thread for a future issue; dropped = not pursued further.

thread_id.description: When deferred, the thread id under which it carries forward.
